items.example: Fathers should take more responsibility for their children.
She took part in her first play last year.
A year ago she took up a new hobby: acting.
I get on well with my colleagues.
I did a lot of research before I got my degree.
Can you do me a favour and help me with this test?
Last night we went for a walk after dinner.
Many women have gone on a diet at some point.
I hope I don't go grey when I'm thirty!
